figures.caption: Fig. 4: Evolution of total vehicles in the network

Fig. 1: Hierarchical control framework for CAVs in mixed traffic. For each CAV with a given origin and destination, the upper layer determines the route, with candidate routes shown in different colors. At each signalized intersection, the phase durations are displayed. The lower layer then designs the CAV trajectories (red curves).
Fig. 5: Comparison of network performance under different control configurations.
